demoProject.title: Evidence-grounded multi-model research workbench
demoProject.goal: Validate whether a web-based, multi-model, evidence-grounded deliberation system is useful and technically feasible for long-horizon research.
demoProject.initialIdea: A local-first web UI where multiple AI models collaboratively research, critique, revise, and finalize ideas using evidence, counter-evidence, source auditing, context manifests, and iterative consensus loops.

mockSearch.behavior: Deterministic substring matching against the query field; return fallbackResults only when no match is found.

seedEvidence.title: Multi-agent debate can improve reasoning under constrained conditions

seedEvidence.claimHint: model consensus can be treated as correctness
seedEvidence.title: False consensus risks in LLM-as-judge workflows
